meta.title: Coffee Relief — Specialty Coffee from Ecuador
meta.description: Premium specialty coffee roasted at origin in Ecuador. Direct trade, sustainable, internationally awarded. Shop online or visit our café.

footer.tagline: Ecuadorian specialty coffee roasted at origin. Direct trade, sustainable, internationally awarded.

beat1.headline: From Ecuadorian origin
beat1.subline: Roasted on the slopes of the volcano

beat1.headline: Volcanic by nature
beat1.body: At 1,800 meters, the volcanic ash soils of northern Ecuador concentrate sugars and acidity into every cherry. Coffee doesn't grow here despite the terrain — it grows because of it.
beat1.imageAlt: Volcanic hillsides of northern Ecuador at dawn, Coffee Relief coffee farm

beat2.headline: Only the bean at its peak
beat2.body: Each cherry is picked by hand at exactly the right shade of red. An expert picker selects from 40,000 beans per day and discards anything the tree wasn't ready to release.
beat2.imageAlt: Hands picking ripe coffee cherries on the farm, manual harvest in Ecuador

beat3.headline: Roasted where it's born
beat3.body: We roast at origin, at 2,850 meters above sea level. The reduced pressure demands more time in the drum — that extra margin is where we develop the cocoa, caramel and hazelnut notes that define Coffee Relief.
beat3.imageAlt: Artisan roasting drum in Quito with coffee beans in transformation

beat4.headline: From producer to your cup
beat4.body: We buy directly from three producer families in Imbabura, at above-market prices. No exporters, no brokers. Exceptional coffee requires that those who grow it can keep growing it.
beat4.imageAlt: Ecuadorian farmer delivering green coffee sacks directly to Coffee Relief

cafeteria.title: The Café
cafeteria.summary: A space where espresso takes shape. Precision barism, intimate atmosphere and single-origin beans. Come discover why every cup is an unrepeatable experience.
cafeteria.imageAlt: Espresso bar at Coffee Relief café, Quito

tienda.title: Coffee Online
tienda.summary: Small batches of Ecuadorian volcanic coffee, roasted weekly and shipped straight to your door. Light, medium or intense — you choose the depth of the journey.
tienda.imageAlt: Coffee Relief kraft bag on wooden table

tasting.title: Tasting
tasting.summary: Sessions guided by our Q-Grader: learn to identify flavor notes, origins and fermentation processes. Specialty coffee explained from the cup.
tasting.imageAlt: Cupping session with tasting cups and sensory evaluation sheets

brunch.title: Brunch
brunch.summary: Seasonal cooking with local ingredients, editorial presentation and the exact coffee for every moment of the morning. A brunch designed so that time doesn't matter.
brunch.imageAlt: Coffee Relief brunch table with artisan ceramics and specialty coffee

bold.description: Chocolate-forward with structured sweetness and a balanced body. Low acidity, full presence.
bold.imageAlt: Bold Relief bag — illustration of a person in a café with a mountain mural in the background

tropical.description: Bright, floral, and full of citrus complexity. A medium roast that surprises with every sip.
tropical.imageAlt: Tropical Relief bag — illustration of a person in an active outdoor scene

immersive.description: Smooth, balanced, and accessible. A medium roast designed to be enjoyed any way you brew it.
immersive.imageAlt: Immersive Relief bag — illustration of a person brewing coffee at home with a Chemex

q1.question: When do you usually drink your coffee?

options.manana: First thing in the morning, before breakfast

q2.question: What do you look for in a cup?

options.potente: Bold, with body and a long finish

q3.question: How do you brew your coffee at home?

options.cafeteria: I prefer it at a café

bold.headline: Bold Relief
bold.message: Deep, persistent and no-nonsense — the coffee for those who know exactly what they want.

immersive.headline: Immersive Relief
immersive.message: Smooth, balanced and dependable — the coffee that's there for you every single day.

tropical.headline: Tropical Relief
tropical.message: Bright, floral and full of life — the coffee for those who want something different.

espresso-largo.name: Espresso Lungo
espresso-largo.description: Bold Relief · 18 g · 45 ml · direct extraction at 9 bar.
espresso-largo.imageAlt: Espresso cup on volcanic stone surface

cortado-origen.name: Origin Cortado
cortado-origen.description: Bold Relief with whole Cayambe milk, 1:1 ratio.
cortado-origen.imageAlt: Cortado in a glass with latte art

filtrado-volcanico.name: Volcanic Filter
filtrado-volcanico.description: V60 · Tropical Relief · 15 g · 250 ml · 92 °C. Floral and citrusy.
filtrado-volcanico.imageAlt: V60 brewing with natural side lighting

latte-temporada.name: Seasonal Latte
latte-temporada.description: Double espresso, textured milk and artisan cane syrup.
latte-temporada.imageAlt: Large latte cup with microfoam and amber syrup

tostada-masa-madre.name: Sourdough Toast
tostada-masa-madre.description: Natural leavened bread, Valle del Chota avocado, poached egg.
tostada-masa-madre.imageAlt: Sourdough toast with avocado and poached egg on ceramic plate

benedictinos-altiplano.name: Altiplano Benedict
benedictinos-altiplano.description: Homemade muffin, serrano ham, yellow chili hollandaise.
benedictinos-altiplano.imageAlt: Eggs benedict with hollandaise sauce on artisan muffin

bowl-andino.name: Andean Bowl
bowl-andino.description: Black quinoa, roasted sweet potato, sautéed spinach and coconut yogurt.
bowl-andino.imageAlt: Bowl with quinoa, sweet potato and vegetables on linen

crepe-guayaba.name: Guava Crêpe
crepe-guayaba.description: Light batter, Ecuadorian guava, cream cheese and cane honey.
crepe-guayaba.imageAlt: Folded crêpe with guava and cane honey on white plate

cold-brew.name: Concentrate Cold Brew
cold-brew.description: 20 hours cold brew · Tropical Relief · Clean, bright, no acidity.
cold-brew.imageAlt: Tall cold brew glass with ice and condensation

tonica-cafe.name: Coffee Tonic
tonica-cafe.description: Cold brew, artisan tonic water and Puembo orange zest.
tonica-cafe.imageAlt: Coffee tonic with orange slice and bubbles in a low glass

batido-platano.name: Banana Shake
batido-platano.description: Immersive Relief, ripe banana, oat milk and cinnamon.
batido-platano.imageAlt: Creamy shake with cinnamon dusted on top
